title: Capital letters and Shift patterns
description: Mixed case typing — Shift held for caps, released for lower
text: London, Paris, New York, Tokyo. The CEO of TechCorp said: "AI will change SaaS, IoT, and ML." Alice Brown won the Nobel Prize.
finger_focus: Shift + letter for capitals — opposite-hand Shift rule

tips.text: For A (left pinky): use right Shift

tips.target: London, Paris, New York, Tokyo. The CEO of TechCorp said: "AI
tips.hint: Shift + letter for capitals — opposite-hand Shift rule

tips.text: For L (right ring): use left Shift

tips.title: Подсказка
tips.text: Acronyms (CEO, AI, SaaS): hold Shift for entire word

tips.target: will change SaaS, IoT, and ML." Alice Brown won the Nobel Prize.

character_tips.anna: Capital letters demand smooth Shift use. Opposite hand rule.
character_tips.maxim: Names, places, acronyms — capitals are everywhere in pro writing.
character_tips.klavochka: Big and small letters dancing — like a parade! 🎉
